arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs Union Berlin
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will be looking to get their first league win under new manager Niko Kovac when they host Union Berlin at Signal Iduna Park on Saturday. In their last…

arts.ttl: Champions League draw LIVE: Arsenal, Liverpool and Aston Villa learn last-16 opponents and route to the final
arts.sum: The three Premier League sides will learn who they face in the round of 16, as well as their potential opponents in the quarter-finals and semi-finals

arts.ttl: Official | Borussia Dortmund defender Almugera Kabar receives professional contract
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have officially signed defensive prospect Almugera Kabar to a contract extension.
